name: Irish Curd Cake
recipeInstructions:
Crust Preparation:
- Preheat oven to 350°F.
Cheesecake Filling:
- Cottage cheese (2 cups)
- Sugar (3 tablespoons, granulated)
- Butter (softened, 1 tablespoon)
- Lemon rind (grated, half a teaspoon)
- Lemon juice (half a teaspoon)
- Eggs (large, 2 whole; reserve 1 egg white)
Sugar Glaze:
- Confectioners' sugar (2 tablespoons)
- Butter (melted, 2 tablespoons)
- Unbleached flour (2 tablespoons)
Combine the cottage cheese with lemon rind and lemon juice. Beat in butter until smooth. Add remaining ingredients gradually while stirring constantly to prevent curdling.
Pour batter into prepared crust. Spread glaze evenly over top using a spatula.
Bake for 35 minutes or until golden brown. Allow cooling completely at room temperature before serving.
